title: Better Craft For Fletching Table
description: This mod adds a better craft for fletching table. This mod not remove a vanilla craft
body:
This mod adds a better craft for fletching table. You need a 5 oak planks, 1 arrow, 1 target, 1 bow, and 1 feather to craft a fletching table. This mod not remove a vanilla craft
I'm create this mod for make a craft like a block texture
